Class KubernetesConfigDataLocationResolver

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.configdata.KubernetesConfigDataLocationResolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.boot.context.config.ConfigDataLocationResolver<KubernetesConfigDataResource>, org.springframework.core.Ordered
Direct Known Subclasses:
Fabric8ConfigDataLocationResolver, KubernetesClientConfigDataLocationResolver
public abstract class KubernetesConfigDataLocationResolver extends Object implements org.springframework.boot.context.config.ConfigDataLocationResolver<KubernetesConfigDataResource>, org.springframework.core.Ordered
Author:
Ryan Baxter, wind57
